name: ISO-CE-Compliance-V2.docx
content:
Are C.E. King machines CE marked and what certifications do they hold?

Yes. All current C.E. King machines are CE marked and manufactured within ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management Systems. Machines are designed in compliance with both UKCA and CE standards, and are built to meet EU Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC and Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2004/108/EC.

Details

  • All current machines carry CE certification and are designed in compliance with UKCA and CE standards
  • Manufacturing follows ISO 9001:2015 quality management standards
  • Compliance with EU Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC
  • Compliance with Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2004/108/EC
  • FDA-compliant contact materials: product contact parts manufactured using materials meeting U.S. FDA requirements for safe contact with food and pharmaceutical substances
  • Machines manufactured before 1993 (when CE marking was introduced in the EU) will not have CE certificates
  • Machines suitable for pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, food, cosmetic, and chemical applications
  • Optional IQ/OQ (Installation Qualification / Operational Qualification) validation support documentation available for pharmaceutical environments
  • CE Declaration of Conformity available on request for current production models
  • For GMP-specific documentation or compliance enquiries, contact the sales team
  • Country of origin for all current machines: United Kingdom
  • C.E. King complies with the Bribery Act 2010 and Modern Slavery Act 2015
  • Export control: buyers must comply with all applicable export control laws (UK, EU, and US regulations)
  • If you need compliance documentation for regulatory purposes, provide your machine serial number

Link:

https://www.ceking.com/pages/contact
